scripts.install:apps: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.setup:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=[['server/.env.example','server/.env'],['client/.env.example','client/.env.local']]; for (const [src,dest] of files){ if(!fs.existsSync(dest)){ fs.copyFileSync(src,dest); console.log('Created '+dest); } else { console.log('Keeping existing '+dest); } }"
scripts.db:create: mysql -u root -p -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS vistaflow;"
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run db:create && npm run db:prepare
scripts.dev: npm run setup:env && concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix client run start"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
